summary: Completed testing of User <-> Employee bidirectional sync feature. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Create User modal with 'Create Employee Record' toggle verified working. Fixed 3 response model issues (UserResponse.employee_id, EmployeeResponse.role, EmployeeResponse.termination_date, EmployeeResponse.created_via).
passed_tests: Backend: test_01_login_super_admin - Super admin login successful
Backend: test_02_create_user_with_employee_record - User created with create_employee_record=true, employee record created and linked
Backend: test_03_update_user_deactivate_syncs_to_employee_terminated - User is_active=false syncs to employee status='terminated'
Backend: test_04_update_user_reactivate_syncs_to_employee_active - User is_active=true syncs to employee status='active'
Backend: test_05_sync_department_change - User department update syncs to employee
Backend: test_06_sync_role_change - User role update syncs to employee
Backend: test_07_sync_full_name_change - User full_name update syncs to employee
Backend: test_08_create_user_without_employee_record - User created without employee when create_employee_record=false
Backend: test_09_delete_user_terminates_employee - User deletion terminates linked employee
Backend: test_01_create_employee_with_user_account - Employee creation with /hr/employees/with-user creates linked user
Frontend: test_users_page_has_create_employee_toggle - UsersPage.jsx has correct data-testid attributes
Frontend: Users page loads via direct URL /users
Frontend: Create User modal opens with Add User button
Frontend: Create Employee Record toggle is visible and enabled by default
Frontend: Designation and Joining Date fields appear when toggle is enabled
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 7480-7483 - Added termination_date, role, created_via to EmployeeResponse model)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with prefix 'test.sync', 'test.delete', 'emp.sync' - cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bidirectional sync between User Management and Employee Master is fully working. User creation with create_employee_record=true creates linked employee. User deactivation/deletion terminates linked employee. Employee creation via /hr/employees/with-user creates linked user. Field sync works for: department, role, full_name, is_active->employment_status. Response models fixed to include employee_id, termination_date, role, created_via fields.

user_to_employee_sync.create_user_with_employee: ✓ Working - POST /api/users with create_employee_record=true creates employee and links via employee_id
user_to_employee_sync.deactivate_user_terminates_employee: ✓ Working - PUT /api/users/{id} with is_active=false sets employee employment_status='terminated' and termination_date
user_to_employee_sync.reactivate_user_activates_employee: ✓ Working - PUT /api/users/{id} with is_active=true sets employee employment_status='active' and clears termination_date
user_to_employee_sync.delete_user_terminates_employee: ✓ Working - DELETE /api/users/{id} sets linked employee to terminated
user_to_employee_sync.sync_department: ✓ Working - User department change syncs to employee
user_to_employee_sync.sync_role: ✓ Working - User role change syncs to employee
user_to_employee_sync.sync_full_name: ✓ Working - User full_name change syncs to employee

employee_to_user_sync.create_employee_with_user: ✓ Working - POST /api/hr/employees/with-user creates user and links via user_id

frontend_ui.users_page: ✓ Working - Loads at /users with user list
frontend_ui.create_user_modal: ✓ Working - Opens with Add User button
frontend_ui.create_employee_toggle: ✓ Working - Visible and enabled by default

fixes_applied.description: Added employee_id field to UserResponse model to expose linked employee UUID in API responses
Added termination_date, role, and created_via fields to EmployeeResponse model for sync tracking
